features: Pack of 24 Silver & Glitter Spiral Birthday Candles

description: Product Description Put a fun twist on a birthday classic with these glitter & Silver spiral birthday candles. Featuring a cool spiral design and a range of shimmering finishes, these assorted cake candles are ready to add charming style to any birthday party. Use them to instantly spruce up your celebration cake, whether it’s a traditional birthday cake or a batch of cupcakes. Safety Warning For safe use, keep this candle away from flammable materials, do not leave it unattended while burning, monitor the burn time, and properly dispose of the remnants.
